sub_brands_detected.name: DataBridge Cloud
sub_brands_detected.hint: Distinct cloud data platform with its own GitHub org (databridge-cloud) and docs portal at cloud.databridge.io

sub_brands_detected.name: DataBridge Edge
sub_brands_detected.hint: On-premise edge processing product with separate npm package namespace @databridge-edge and independent release cadence

sub_brands_detected.name: DataBridge Streams
sub_brands_detected.hint: Real-time streaming product with dedicated engineering team, own PyPI packages (databridge-streams), and separate changelog

guidance: DataBridge operates three structurally independent engineering surfaces. Each has its own GitHub organization, package namespace, and documentation portal. Re-invoke discovery with 'databridge/databridge-cloud', 'databridge/databridge-edge', or 'databridge/databridge-streams' to target a specific sub-brand.
